touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Ivy Kang introducing call recording and coaching solutions for healthcare IT teams. No response received.
Follow-up email highlighting ROI improvements for CS teams using conversation intelligence. No response received.
Third email attempt sharing case study from similar healthcare IT company. No response received.
Cold call placed to Ivy Kang. Left voicemail introducing platform and requesting brief conversation.
LinkedIn message sent referencing mutual connection and BeaconIO's recent growth. No response received.
Email sharing specific use case for coaching customer success teams at scale. No response received.
Final attempt email offering 15-minute consultation on improving CS team performance. No response received.
LinkedIn message with video link showing platform dashboard for CS leaders. No response received.

Brief qualification call with Ivy. She expressed interest in improving coaching consistency across her CS team of 17 people. Currently using manual call reviews which takes significant time. Open to exploring automation solutions.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for coaching your CS team?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual review of random calls, very time-consuming and inconsistent

questions_asked.question: How large is your customer success team?
questions_asked.answer: 17 team members handling our mid-market healthcare clients

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Email recap of qualification call with overview deck attached. Confirmed discovery call for the following week.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with our existing CRM and support tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major platforms

touches.ai_summary: Call attempt to confirm discovery meeting. No answer, left voicemail.
Confirmation email for tomorrow's discovery call with agenda topics and prep questions.
Brief call with Ivy confirming discovery meeting time and discussing her key priorities around coaching automation and performance visibility.

questions_asked.question: Can you show examples of coaching workflows in the platform?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, I'll include that in tomorrow's discovery session

next_steps: Proceed with discovery call as scheduled

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call covering BeaconIO's current challenges with manual coaching processes and lack of visibility into CS team performance. Ivy described difficulty scaling coaching to 17 reps and maintaining quality standards. Discussed their use case for call recording and automated coaching.

questions_asked.question: What are the biggest pain points with your current coaching approach?
questions_asked.answer: Inconsistency and time - I can only review 2-3 calls per rep per month

questions_asked.question: What metrics matter most for your CS team?
questions_asked.answer: CSAT, retention, and time to resolution are our key indicators

questions_asked.question: How does pricing typically work for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Typically per-seat licensing, I can provide detailed pricing after understanding your full requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with discovery call summary, technical requirements document, and implementation timeline overview.
Follow-up call to review technical requirements and discuss integration with BeaconIO's existing tech stack. Ivy confirmed budget availability and interest in moving forward.

questions_asked.question: Do you have budget allocated for this type of solution?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have budget for CS tools this quarter

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for full rollout with your team size

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message to Omar Osei introducing the project and requesting involvement in upcoming demo. No response received.

Call with Ivy to prepare for technical evaluation. Discussed specific coaching scenarios to demonstrate and confirmed key stakeholders for demo. Ivy mentioned needing Omar's sign-off for final decision.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in the evaluation process?
questions_asked.answer: Omar Osei, our SVP of Revenue, will need to approve any purchase

questions_asked.question: Can we test this with a small group before full rollout?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we recommend a phased approach starting with 5-7 users

next_steps: Get Omar on calendar for demo

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Ivy and three CS team members. Demonstrated call recording, AI-powered coaching suggestions, and performance analytics dashboard. Team tested key workflows including automated call scoring and custom coaching templates. Generally positive reception with detailed questions about customization.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the scoring criteria for our specific use cases?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable scoring models and coaching templates

questions_asked.question: How does the AI handle healthcare-specific terminology?
questions_asked.answer: Our model is trained on industry-specific language and can be further customized

questions_asked.question: What specific coaching scenarios would you want to automate first?
questions_asked.answer: Objection handling and empathy scoring are top priorities

objections: Concern about accuracy of AI scoring for complex customer interactions

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Ivy to review pricing options and package configurations. Discussed 17-seat unlimited automation tier at $13,600 ACV.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: All AI features, unlimited call recordings, custom workflows, and premium support

touches.ai_summary: Full platform demo with Ivy and two team leads. Walked through end-to-end workflows from call recording to automated coaching delivery. Demonstrated ROI calculator showing potential time savings. Team engaged with detailed questions about reporting and user adoption.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting can we provide to leadership?
questions_asked.answer: Executive dashboards with team performance trends, coaching impact, and ROI metrics

questions_asked.question: What concerns do you have about team adoption?
questions_asked.answer: Some reps might be resistant to being recorded and scored

questions_asked.question: Do you offer change management support?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we provide best practices and rollout templates

objections: Team adoption concerns and change management

touches.ai_summary: Initial exec meeting with Omar Osei. Ivy provided context on the evaluation process. Omar focused on business impact and ROI. Discussed strategic importance of improving CS performance for retention goals.

questions_asked.question: What are your top priorities for the CS organization this year?
questions_asked.answer: Improving retention and scaling our team without proportional cost increases

questions_asked.question: What results have similar companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 25-35% reduction in coaching time and 15-20% improvement in key metrics

next_steps: Deep dive session on ROI and implementation

touches.ai_summary: Extended exec meeting with Omar and Ivy covering detailed ROI analysis, implementation plan, and success metrics. Omar raised questions about pricing and asked for comparison with market alternatives. Discussed strategic fit with BeaconIO's growth plans and customer retention goals. Omar requested more competitive pricing given team size.

questions_asked.question: What kind of discount can you offer for annual commitment?
questions_asked.answer: I can work with leadership on volume discounting for annual contracts

questions_asked.question: Have you worked with other healthcare IT companies our size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, several in the 500-1000 employee range with similar use cases

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Need to finalize by end of quarter to hit our CS improvement goals

objections: Pricing concerns - higher than anticipated budget

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Ivy. Discussed revised proposal with multiple pricing tiers. Ivy indicated Omar is supportive but pushing for better pricing. She mentioned budget constraints and asked about flexibility on terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a smaller tier and expand later?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, though the unlimited tier provides the best value for your use case

questions_asked.question: What pricing would make this an easy yes for Omar?
questions_asked.answer: Something closer to $10k would fit more comfortably in our allocated budget

touches.ai_summary: Email to Omar sharing customer reference information and case studies from similar healthcare IT companies. No response received.

Pricing call with Ivy to discuss discount options. Presented 27% discount bringing ACV to $13,600 for annual commitment and case study participation. Ivy responded positively and believes Omar will approve at this price point.

questions_asked.question: What would you need from us for this discount level?
questions_asked.answer: Annual commitment and willingness to be a reference customer

questions_asked.question: Does this pricing work within your budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this should work. I'll need to run it by Omar but I'm optimistic

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with updated proposal reflecting 27% discount and annual terms. Included contract draft and implementation timeline.
Check-in email to Ivy on proposal status and Omar's review. Confirmed next steps for legal review and contract execution.

questions_asked.question: Can we adjust the payment terms to net-45?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I can accommodate net-45 terms

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Ivy (rescheduled from earlier in week). Discussed final contract terms including payment schedule, implementation timeline, and support SLAs. Ivy confirmed Omar's approval and readiness to move forward pending minor contract adjustments.

questions_asked.question: What does the implementation support include?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, training sessions, and 90-day onboarding support

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining blockers to signing?
questions_asked.answer: Just need legal to review the MSA, should be quick

next_steps: Target signature by end of week
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Final follow-up email with executed contract ready for signature. Confirmed implementation kickoff date and initial training sessions.
